src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the Java EE javax.annotation package to the Jakarta EE jakarta.annotation package.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Java 11 and is not available in Java 17; using it causes a compilation error (package not found).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation imports to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile without jakarta.annotation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove deprecated Zuul proxy annotation as it is incompatible with Spring Cloud Gateway and Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: EnableZuulProxy class is removed in Spring Cloud Gateway; code fails to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Fix invalid escape sequence in string literal to comply with stricter Java compiler rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: invalid escape sequence '\'' in string literal (Java 17 compiler is stricter about unrecognized escape sequences than older versions).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace JPA repository and auditing annotations with R2DBC equivalents to switch from synchronous to reactive database access.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The application fails to start or compile because the JPA-specific annotations (@EnableJpaRepositories, @EnableJpaAuditing) are incompatible with the new R2DBC data layer configuration, and the required R2DBC beans are missing.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add custom type converters for UUID, Instant, BitSet, Duration, and ZonedDateTime to support R2DBC data mapping.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: R2DBC drivers do not natively support all Java types (like UUID or Instant) in the same way JPA does; without these converters, runtime exceptions occur when reading/writing these types to the database.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Register the custom converters with the R2DBC conversion infrastructure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Without registering the converters via R2dbcCustomConversions, the R2DBC template will not use them, leading to runtime errors when handling unsupported types.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Configure the R2DBC dialect bean to resolve database-specific SQL rendering rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: R2DBC operations require a dialect to generate correct SQL for the specific database driver; missing this bean causes runtime failures in query execution.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Configure the UpdateMapper bean for R2DBC update operations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: R2DBC repository operations for updates require an UpdateMapper bean; its absence causes runtime errors during save/update operations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
@Bean
public UpdateMapper updateMapper(R2dbcDialect dialect, MappingR2dbcConverter mappingR2dbcConverter) { ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Configure the SqlRenderer bean for R2DBC SQL generation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: R2DBC query generation relies on SqlRenderer; missing this bean leads to runtime failures when executing queries.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Switch the configuration class from implementing the servlet-based WebMvcConfigurer to the reactive WebFluxConfigurer.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class implements an interface (WebMvcConfigurer) that belongs to the Spring MVC (servlet) stack, which is incompatible with a Spring WebFlux (reactive) application context; using the wrong interface leads to runtime errors or ignored configuration in a reactive setup.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
import org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer;
public class DateTimeFormatConfiguration implements WebMvcConfigurer {
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
import org.springframework.web.reactive.config.WebFluxConfigurer;
public class DateTimeFormatConfiguration implements WebFluxConfigurer {

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated SpringLiquibaseUtil utility with AsyncSpringLiquibase class for asynchronous database migration execution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: SpringLiquibaseUtil.createAsyncSpringLiquibase is removed or deprecated in newer Spring Boot versions, causing compilation errors or runtime failures if the old API is used.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: SpringLiquibase liquibase = SpringLiquibaseUtil.createAsyncSpringLiquibase(this.env, executor, liquibaseDataSource.getIfAvailable(), liquibaseProperties, dataSource.getIfUnique(), dataSourceProperties);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Liquibase bean method signature to remove unused DataSource providers and switch to R2dbcProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old method signature relies on ObjectProvider<DataSource> and DataSourceProperties which are no longer injected or compatible with the new AsyncSpringLiquibase setup, leading to compilation errors due to missing or mismatched parameters.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public SpringLiquibase liquibase(@Qualifier("taskExecutor") Executor executor, @LiquibaseDataSource ObjectProvider<DataSource> liquibaseDataSource, LiquibaseProperties liquibaseProperties, ObjectProvider<DataSource> dataSource, DataSourceProperties dataSourceProperties)
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: public SpringLiquibase liquibase(@Qualifier("taskExecutor") Executor executor, LiquibaseProperties liquibaseProperties, R2dbcProperties dataSourceProperties)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace setLabels with setLabelFilter to match updated LiquibaseProperties API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: LiquibaseProperties.getLabels() is removed/renamed in newer Spring Boot versions; calling it causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add helper method to manually create DataSource for Liquibase using R2dbcProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: AsyncSpringLiquibase requires a DataSource to be set explicitly; the previous auto-configuration via ObjectProvider is no longer used, so a manual DataSource creation is needed to avoid runtime NullPointerExceptions or missing configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: private static DataSource createLiquibaseDataSource(LiquibaseProperties liquibaseProperties, R2dbcProperties dataSourceProperties) { ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update imports to reflect new classes and remove unused ones.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old imports (ObjectProvider, DataSourceProperties, SpringLiquibaseUtil) are no longer used or available, causing compilation errors if retained.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate from Spring MVC (Servlet stack) to Spring WebFlux (Reactive stack) for locale resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring MVC classes like WebMvcConfigurer and LocaleResolver are incompatible with the reactive ServerWebExchange context; the application likely switched to a reactive web server (e.g., Netty) where Servlet APIs are unavailable or cause runtime errors.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public class LocaleConfiguration implements WebMvcConfigurer { ... public LocaleResolver localeResolver() ... public void addInterceptors(InterceptorRegistry registry) ...
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: public class LocaleConfiguration { ... public LocaleContextResolver localeContextResolver() ... public WebFilter localeChangeFilter(LocaleContextResolver localeContextResolver) ...

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation imports.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ moved annotations from javax.* to jakarta.*; using javax.* causes compile errors due to missing classes.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Implement custom LocaleContextResolver for reactive stack to replace AngularCookieLocaleResolver.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The original tech.jhipster.config.locale.AngularCookieLocaleResolver is designed for Servlet environments; a reactive equivalent is required to handle cookies and locale context in WebFlux.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate security configuration from Spring Security MVC (WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter) to Spring Security WebFlux (Reactive).
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter and HttpSecurity are not available in the reactive stack; using them causes compilation errors or runtime failures in a WebFlux application.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace synchronous authentication manager with ReactiveAuthenticationManager bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The reactive security chain requires a ReactiveAuthenticationManager; the old synchronous setup is incompatible with the reactive stack.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Define security filter chain using ServerHttpSecurity instead of HttpSecurity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: HttpSecurity is for MVC; ServerHttpSecurity is required for WebFlux. Without this, the application cannot configure security rules in a reactive context.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update security annotations to enable WebFlux security and reactive method security.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableWebSecurity and @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity are for MVC; @EnableWebFluxSecurity and @EnableReactiveMethodSecurity are required for the reactive stack.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with pathMatchers for reactive request matching.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is not available in the reactive ServerHttpSecurity DSL; pathMatchers is the required replacement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update header configuration to use reactive header writers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old header writers (ReferrerPolicyHeaderWriter) are for MVC; reactive stack requires ReferrerPolicyServerHttpHeadersWriter.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy in header configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Security versions; permissionsPolicy is the standard replacement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration for reactive security.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The new security setup requires explicit OAuth2 JWT configuration for resource server support in the reactive stack.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove dependency on TokenProvider and CorsFilter from constructor.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: These MVC-specific components are no longer used in the reactive security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public SecurityConfiguration(TokenProvider tokenProvider, CorsFilter corsFilter, SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add SpaWebFilter to the reactive security filter chain.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: SPA support requires a specific filter in the reactive chain, replacing the old MVC filter approach.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update content security policy configuration to use JHipsterProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The reactive configuration uses a different DSL for CSP, requiring the policy to be sourced from properties.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add security matcher to ignore static resources in reactive security.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Reactive security requires explicit matching to ignore static resources, replacing the old WebSecurity.ignoring() approach.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Disable HTTP Basic authentication in reactive security.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Explicitly disabling HTTP Basic is required in the new reactive security setup to match previous behavior.
